texto: Here is where some entrepreneurs fail. They are filled with creative juices and total commitment to their business but too often they don't understand that they must also be managers administrators even gofers-at least for a while.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Lillian Vernon sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Here is where some entrepreneurs fail. They are filled with creative juices and total commitment …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, positive, where, útil em momentos de reflexao.
